title: Rich Creamy Rich Stir-fry Onion
description: An earthy, creamy Thai dish featuring onion with a comforting twist, suitable for keto-friendly diets and prepared in a short time frame.

ingredients.name: Thick Soy Sauce (or Regular Soy Sauce)

instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add garlic and cook for about 30 seconds, stirring continuously to avoid burning.
Fold in onions and continue cooking until soft and translucent, approximately 5-7 minutes.
Pour in the heavy cream and coconut milk, stir well.
Season with fish sauce, white pepper powder, cayenne pepper, and thick soy sauce. Stir again.
Bring to a boil then reduce heat and let it simmer for about 2-3 more minutes until slightly thickened.
